title: 350w Personal Sports Blender with 600ml and 300ml Cups - Flip-to-go Lid/Fresh Seal Lid - Anti-Slip Silicone Feet - K3202 - Stainless Steel
features: EASY CLEAN STAINLESS STEEL CABINET WITH 2 CUPS AND 2 LIDS: The Personal Sports Blender comes with 2 Tritan plastic BPA free cups (600ml and 300ml) along with 2 secure screw on lids. Both lids are flip-to-go style for easy drinking when you're out and about or at the gym. The stainless steel motor cabinet/base is sturdy with anti-slip silicone feet and is easily wiped clean with a damp cloth, other parts are dishwasher safe.

CONVENIENT AND EASY TO USE: Blending directly into the cup means there's less mess, less washing up and it's convenient to just screw on your lid and go! Fill one of the blending cups provided with your ingredients, secure the cross blade and then rotate and lock into position on the motor base, then you're ready to plugin and blend.
350W LONGLIFE POWERFUL COPPER MOTOR: Make healthy and delicious smoothies, juices, protein drinks and more with the 350w powerful motor with single speed blending.
DISHWASHER SAFE: All parts are removable from the main motor unit for easy cleaning and are dishwasher safe. The main body should be cleaned with a damp cloth only.
FREE RECIPE BOOK: included are 20 fabulous smoothie recipes for you to try.
description: From the manufacturer Quick Drinks on the Go! Power up your day with this Handy & Compact Sports Blender , designed for smoothie lovers on the go! With a sleek, space-saving design, it blends your favorite fruits, shakes and protein drinks in seconds. Perfect for busy mornings or post-workout refuels, this blender comes with 2 clear sports bottles featuring secure black lids, blend and take your drink with you, no mess, no fuss. Ideal for smoothies, shakes and quick energy boosts anytime, anywhere. Just blend, twist and go! Effortless blending and enhanced functionality with high quality products and budget-friendly prices!
